title: Tirusoolanathar Temple
tagline: Tirusoolanathar Temple — spiritual town of Tamil Nadu

overview.short: Tirusoolanathar Tripurasundari Temple, also known as the Tirusoolanathar Temple, is a Hindu temple located in Tirusulam, a suburb of Chennai, India.
overview.description: Tirusoolanathar Tripurasundari Temple, also known as the Tirusoolanathar Temple, is a Hindu temple located in Tirusulam, a suburb of Chennai, India. The presiding deity is Shiva. The goddess is Tirupurasundari. The temple has inscriptions dating from the Pallava period.

howToReach.roadNote: Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

topPlaces.name: Tirusulam
topPlaces.description: Tirusulam is a southern suburb of Chennai and a census town in Chengalpattu district falling within the Chennai metropolitan area, adjoining the Chennai International Airport, with the cargo terminal located at the adjacent Meenambakkam. The locality is served by Tirusulam railway station and Pallavaram Railway Station.

topPlaces.name: Meenambakkam
topPlaces.description: Meenambakkam is a southern neighbourhood of Chennai in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. It is home to Chennai International Airport, the Airports Authority of India regional office, and the DGQA Complex.

topPlaces.name: Pallavaram
topPlaces.description: Pallavaram (originally Pallavapuram) is a suburb in the southern part of the Chennai metropolitan area. It forms part of Chengalpattu district, and serves as the headquarters of the taluk of the same name.

topPlaces.name: Meenambakkam metro station
topPlaces.description: Meenambakkam is an elevated metro station on the North-South Corridor of the Blue Line of Chennai Metro in Chennai, India. This station serves the neighbourhoods of Meenambakkam and Tirusulam.

topPlaces.name: Ayyappa Nagar
topPlaces.description: Ayyappa Nagar is a residential area within Madipakkam, a southern suburb of Chennai (formerly known as Madras), in Tamil Nadu, India. It was named after the temple built there to Lord Ayyappa, notable, like Sabarimala, for having eighteen steps.

topPlaces.name: Raghava Nagar
topPlaces.description: Raghava Nagar is a residential area within Madipakkam, a southern suburban of Chennai (formerly known as Madras), in Tamil Nadu, India. It is near to Moovarsampet pond .

topPlaces.name: Pallavaram Lake
topPlaces.description: Pallavaram Lake, also known as Periya aeri (Big lake) or Pallavaram aeri, is situated along Pallavaram Thuraipakkam Radial Road. It used to be a large lake, but it dried up and was polluted by industrial wastewater and garbage.

topPlaces.name: Cowl Bazaar
topPlaces.description: Cowl Bazaar is a suburb of Chennai located in the Chengalpattu district of Tamil Nadu, India. It is a village panchayat in St.Thomas Mount Block located north of Pozhichalur and west of Chennai International Airport along the banks of Adyar River.

items.note: Tirusulam is a southern suburb of Chennai and a census town in Chengalpattu district falling within the Chennai metropolitan area, adjoining the Chennai International Airport, with the cargo terminal located at the adjacent Meenambakkam. The locality is served by Tirusulam railway station and Pallavaram Railway Station.

Meenambakkam is a southern neighbourhood of Chennai in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. It is home to Chennai International Airport, the Airports Authority of India regional office, and the DGQA Complex.

Pallavaram (originally Pallavapuram) is a suburb in the southern part of the Chennai metropolitan area. It forms part of Chengalpattu district, and serves as the headquarters of the taluk of the same name.
Meenambakkam is an elevated metro station on the North-South Corridor of the Blue Line of Chennai Metro in Chennai, India. This station serves the neighbourhoods of Meenambakkam and Tirusulam.

Ayyappa Nagar is a residential area within Madipakkam, a southern suburb of Chennai (formerly known as Madras), in Tamil Nadu, India. It was named after the temple built there to Lord Ayyappa, notable, like Sabarimala, for having eighteen steps.
Raghava Nagar is a residential area within Madipakkam, a southern suburban of Chennai (formerly known as Madras), in Tamil Nadu, India. It is near to Moovarsampet pond .

Pallavaram Lake, also known as Periya aeri (Big lake) or Pallavaram aeri, is situated along Pallavaram Thuraipakkam Radial Road. It used to be a large lake, but it dried up and was polluted by industrial wastewater and garbage.

Cowl Bazaar is a suburb of Chennai located in the Chengalpattu district of Tamil Nadu, India. It is a village panchayat in St.Thomas Mount Block located north of Pozhichalur and west of Chennai International Airport along the banks of Adyar River.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Tirusoolanathar Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Tirusoolanathar Temple is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Tirusoolanathar Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Chennai International Airport (2 km) and the nearest railway station is Chennai Central (17 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Tirusoolanathar Temple?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Tirusoolanathar Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Tirusoolanathar Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Tirusoolanathar Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Tirusoolanathar Temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Tirusulam, Meenambakkam, Pallavaram, Meenambakkam metro station, Ayyappa Nagar.
